Stoasht arediy anf fae/4/2013-fafas feats 07-04-2014, & aera @ asrtfere fee aT | -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [Part III—SEc. 4] NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the Ist January, 2015 F.No. L-MISC/VI/H/2007.—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Authorizing Entities to Lay. Build. Operate or Expand City or Local Natural Gas Distribution Networks) Regulations, 2008, namely:-—- 1. to Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Authorizing Entities to Lay, Build, Operate or Expand City or Local Natural Gas Distribution Networks) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. For regulation 19 of the Petroteum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Authorizing Entitics to Lay, Build. Operate or Fxpand City or Local Natural Gas Distribution Networks) Regulations, 2008, the following shall be substituted. namely:— “19. Miscellaneous. If any question arises ag to the interpretation of these regulations, the same shall be decided by the Board.”. yw Namemwana nan nonsn LO WARA RAU. OSDUR Foot Note: Principal regulations were notified vide G.S.R. 196(E) dated 19-03-2008 and amended wide G.S.R. 800(F) dated 19-11-2008, G.S.R. 295(E) dated 30-04-2009, G.S.R. 478(E) dated 07-06-2010, G.S.R. 605(E) dated 19-07-2010. t. No. PNGRB/CGD/REGULATIONS/REVIFE W-2011/2012-HI dated 21-06-2013 and F. No. PNGRB:CGD BID/4/2013-PREBID dated 07-04-2014. -- 2 of 2 --
